The system integrates rule-based filtering, machine learning, and blockchain technology to provide a robust, scalable, and tamper-proof solution for modern network environments.

Based on this model, N, P, and K fertilization strategies were optimized for agronomic (AOF), economic (EOF), and environmentalsocial (ESOF) benefits.
